title: ceraia patentiloba
intro: Ceraia patentiloba, also known as the "Queen of the Night" or "Night-Blooming Jasmine," is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues such as anxiety, insomnia, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Ceraia patentiloba include its ability to reduce stress and promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of coughs and colds. Ceraia patentiloba is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its essential oil is used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce anxiety.
